# third_party / SQL parser fork

This directory holds the parts of voyager's SQL parser that come from outside.

```
third_party/
├── POC.md                  proof-of-concept writeup (architecture, production path, licensing)
├── pg-yb-parser/           YB-EXT delta — patches, Dockerfile, regen.sh, NOTICE
│                           ↳ see pg-yb-parser/README.md
└── pg_query_go/            committed snapshot of the Go binding @ v6.1.0
                            ↳ regenerated by pg-yb-parser/regen.sh
```

**libpg_query is not vendored here** — it's fetched fresh from upstream at
regen time (via `pg-yb-parser/regen.sh`). Only our YB-EXT delta (small set
of patches + Dockerfile + script) lives in git.

## Quick commands

```sh
# Smoke check: voyager builds and parser tests pass against the committed snapshot
make pg-yb-parser-check

# Full regen: fetch upstream libpg_query, apply YB-EXT patches, snapshot
make pg-yb-parser-rebuild
```

See `pg-yb-parser/README.md` for the per-feature contributor workflow.
